clauses_recovered.summary: 20-year term for freestanding. Location-specific only. No territory. No renewal right. Successor per Sec 17.
Franchisee acknowledges no representations as to profits/sales outside the FDD and FA

exhibits_walked.why_deferred: 48-page FA partially walked via targeted pages. Key operative terms recovered from Item 17 chart (pp.82-87) and Sec 1 direct read. Remaining sections (2-22) not individually walked due to volume.
exhibits_walked.what_recovered_elsewhere: Term, renewal, termination, transfer, noncompete, dispute resolution, death/disability all recovered from Item 17 chart with FA section cross-references
exhibits_walked.what_remains_missing: Detailed clause-by-clause language for Sec 5 (standards), Sec 6 (construction), Sec 8 (insurance details), Sec 9 (royalty calculation mechanics), Sec 11 (reports), Sec 13 (indemnification details), Sec 14 (ROFR mechanics), Sec 20 (mediation procedural details)

clauses_recovered.summary: Guarantor acknowledges BKC entered into FA solely on condition of personal guaranty. Includes spouse.

Personal, irrevocable, unconditional guaranty. Joint and several. Guarantor personally bound as if franchisee. Includes unfair competition (Sec 12), assignment (Sec 15), restrictive covenant (Sec 19). Must indemnify BKC.

exhibits_walked.what_remains_missing: Waiver provisions (likely in pp.278-281) not individually read

exhibits_walked.why_deferred: 41-page lease deferred. Key terms recovered from Item 17 BKL chart (pp.90-91) covering term, renewal, termination, cure periods, transfer, ROFR, environmental obligations.
exhibits_walked.what_recovered_elsewhere: Term (20 yrs), no renewal right, termination with cause only, cure periods (5/10/30 days), ROFR on adjacent property, environmental remediation obligation, cross-default with FA
exhibits_walked.what_remains_missing: Detailed rent calculation mechanics, maintenance obligations, insurance requirements, assignment conditions, condemnation provisions, subletting restrictions

exhibits_walked.why_deferred: 24-page DA deferred. Key terms recovered from Item 17 DA chart (pp.92-96) covering term, termination, transfer, noncompete, leverage covenants.
exhibits_walked.what_recovered_elsewhere: Term (3-15 yrs), no renewal, termination cure periods, non-curable defaults (including FSS 'F' grade, excessive leverage ratios), brand damage fee, transfer at sole discretion
exhibits_walked.what_remains_missing: Detailed development schedule mechanics, site approval process, construction requirements, FSS grade calculation methodology, EBITDA/EBITDAR ratio specifics

exhibits_walked.deferred_pages: IL, IN, MD, MN, NY, ND, RI, VA, WI state addenda pages not individually structured
exhibits_walked.why_deferred: 96 pages covering 12+ states. Only CA, MI, WA directly walked. Remaining states follow similar override patterns.
